diagrams.title: File System Mounting Process Flow
diagrams.description: Shows how a storage device's file system gets integrated into the OS directory tree
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how mounting connects physical/storage to the logical directory hierarchy

diagrams.title: Virtual File System (VFS) Architecture
diagrams.description: Illustrates how VFS provides abstraction between OS system calls and actual file system implementations
diagrams.purpose: Shows how multiple different file systems can coexist and be accessed through a single unified interface

diagrams.title: Mount Table Structure
diagrams.description: Represents the data structure maintaining information about all mounted file systems
diagrams.purpose: Understanding what information the OS maintains about each mounted file system
